perf_hint: a few noise octaves inside the fog bank and an early exit above it, so frame time is dominated by the resolution

params.name: height
params.description: How high the resting fog bank stands, as a fraction of the frame.

params.name: wind
params.description: How fast the fog drifts sideways.

params.name: thicken
params.description: How much the low mids thicken the fog.

params.name: layers
params.description: How many depths of fog drift past each other.

params.name: pale
params.description: How white the fog is; 0 keeps it in the palette's low end.

params.name: sway
params.description: How much the bass leans the fog bank's ceiling.

params.name: brightness
params.description: How much light the loudness of the song puts into the fog.
